deck_title: NorthBridge Compliance Solutions - Simulated FDD Report (45-slide deck)
narrative_arc: Risks, reporting environment, and close plan

slides.rationale: Cover layout establishes engagement context and locks target/company/period anchors for fact fidelity.
Agenda layout provides clear navigation and supports deck-first workflow coherence.
